Description:
Embellished with a palm tree motif reminiscent of the palms found all over the city, our Cairo Palm Napkins bring a touch of Egypt to any table arrangement. With a double-stitched frame, they are fun yet understated.Made entirely by hand on linen by the women at the Malaika Training Centre (TOH) in Cairo.
Size:46cm x46cm18" x 18"100% Linen (Ecru Linen)
